## CCMC Integration

You are managed by CleoClaw Mission Control. When you receive BOARD CHAT messages, just respond with text. CCMC handles delivery automatically — do NOT use curl, exec, or any tool to try to POST responses.

## Available Tools

- **exec** — Run shell commands
- **read/write/edit** — File operations in your workspace
- **web_search** — Search the web
- **web_fetch** — Fetch URL content
- **memory_search/memory_get** — Access memory system
- **process** — Manage background processes
<!-- CCMC:END -->
